item.title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that applies a novel approach to inspecting chips.

item.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]

item.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

item.title: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

item.title: Your gaming data could be the secret to AGI, according to this Bezos-backed startup
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan, Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]

item.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
item.dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
item.description: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

item.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

item.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
item.dc:creator: Kate Park
item.description: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11 billion valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

item.title: Final extension: Startup Battlefield Australia applications now close July 20
item.dc:creator: Isabelle Johannessen
item.description: If you're building something ambitious, this is a fast track to the people who can move your startup forward.

item.title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.

item.title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.

item.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

item.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

item.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
item.dc:creator: Kate Park
item.description: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150 million from Meituan and Tencent at a $1 billion valuation.

item.title: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump
item.dc:creator: Anthony Ha
item.description: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.

item.title: Almost 90 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: With AI igniting an investor frenzy, more startups are achieving unicorn status every month.

item.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

item.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

item.title: Last chance to apply — Startup Battlefield Australia applications close July 6
item.dc:creator: Isabelle Johannessen
item.description: If you're going to apply for Startup Battlefield Australia, now is the time. Applications close July 6, and once the deadline passes, the opportunity is gone.

item.title: IQM, Europe’s first public quantum company, admits the future of the tech is uncertain
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: IQM, a full-stack quantum company out of Finland, went public on the Nasdaq today at a valuation of about $1.9 billion.
